title: Mace 3D
body:
# Important!
- **Do not pay attention that the resource pack is marked as old, this is normal, it performs its task;**
- Optifine is not needed.

# Description
Some players didn't like the texture of the mace, I'm one of those people. I get dissonance when I see the three-dimensional texture of a heavy core, but after crafting I get a two-dimensional mace... maybe that's my problem.



### [Model mace (click to preview)](https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/mace-minecraft-4f89e27c7ffe406c97bdcb1684b47595)

![3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/954f1bbb19fe4733003edc53951cefd1648f2ff6.png)

### Mace in hand

![hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d8827fd27b492093b9857aeb5232c4f8b18e292.png)

### Mace in HUD

![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecdd5357a4615236522509dc9a899356afc256e0.png)
